name: Smart Closet Inc.
summary: Smart Closet Inc., through its subsidiary Resources Printing & Graphics, Inc., provides printing and a multitude of other graphic services and solutions to their clients in the Orange County area of Southern California. It offers digital and offset printing, poster and banner printing, paper product boxes printing, direct mail, graphic design, and CD/DVD printing and replication services. The company was formerly known as Resource Ventures Inc. and changed its name to Smart Closet Inc. in March 2020. Smart Closet Inc. was founded in 1985 and is based in Silverado, California.
